card_description: A symbolic paradise realm that PKD envisioned as the true reality behind phenomenal appearances.
full_description:
A symbolic paradise realm that PKD envisioned as the true reality behind phenomenal appearances.

**Category:** PKD Visionary

**Key segment contexts:**
- (September 15, 1976) Dick proposes a radical theory: humans are not "fallen men" but "fallen angels" with degenerated memories and powers. He views 3-74 as a "pre-experience of the Parousia" occurring out of sync with ...
- (September 15, 1976) Dick explores the "Man from the Future" theory, suggesting that his 74 experience was a "retroactive mending" of the past by a sentient entity traveling backward from the end of time. He considers ...
- (September 15, 1976) Dick concludes his massive day of theorizing by realizing the 1st Advent is an "Eternal Now" (always occurring at the vernal equinox) and the "Rome" memories were incidentals of an "Internal Epipha...

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_49.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_52.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_57.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_58.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_85.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_88.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_103.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_130.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_131.txt
